title: My Favorite Twilight Knockoff
description: A longform video essay by Jenny Nicholson examining a notable work of fiction that closely mirrors the plot, structure, and themes of Stephenie Meyer's Twilight saga. Nicholson applies her signature analytical and comedic approach to evaluate the derivative work's relationship to its source material.

aiDisclosure.notes: Jenny Nicholson's video essays are traditionally produced longform content featuring direct-to-camera narration, screen captures, and edited footage. No evidence of AI-generated content. Classification: camera-captured with standard post-production editing.
